expectedIssues: Wrong Poker item is highlighted in the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: Multiple game cards on the right side are visually cut off/truncated. The third column of game tiles (e.g., 'Magni Pho...' and 'Munc Mi...') are clipped at the right edge, making titles and imagery incomplete.
The 'Hot Ga...' navigation tab label in the top navigation bar is cut off, making the tab label unreadable.

The bottom navigation bar icons appear to have inconsistent visual weight — the 'Poker' icon is highlighted in gold/yellow while others are muted, but the active state styling could be clearer for the currently selected section.
The third game card in the 'Top Played New Games' bottom row appears mostly dark/black with very little visible content, suggesting an image may have failed to load or is very dark.

expected.reasoning: Issue 2 describes the Poker icon in the bottom navigation bar being highlighted in gold/yellow with unclear active state styling, matching the expectation of wrong item highlighting.
